prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your online course forward
items: Outline and script your first course module with detailed learning objectives and key takeaways
Design and create a comprehensive course curriculum that maps all modules to specific learning outcomes
Create detailed video scripts and recording schedules for your first three course lessons
Develop a detailed content delivery schedule that breaks each module into structured teaching segments with clear transitions
Create detailed assessments and quizzes to measure student comprehension for each course module
Set up your dedicated learning environment and test all technical requirements
